name: Submit stack with quality PR descriptions
query: Submit all branches in my stack as PRs
setup_commands: # Assume a stack already exists with 2-3 branches
# Each branch has commits with conventional commit messages
expected_behavior: Runs 'stackit log' to see which branches will be submitted
For each branch without PR, gathers commit info using 'git log'
Generates PR title from first commit (may remove conventional prefix for cleaner title)
- Any additional sections from project template
Uses 'stackit submit --stack' to submit all branches
anti_patterns: Creates PRs with placeholder content ('TODO', 'TBD', etc.)
Submits without checking for project templates
